name: stickyfix
description: Pin sticky notes on any page — your AI reads them.

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.host.json && node --test dist/host/test/serial.test.js dist/host/test/security.test.js dist/host/test/write-note.test.js dist/host/test/server.test.js dist/host/test/config.test.js dist/host/test/index.test.js
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.host.json && node scripts/clean-room-check.mjs && node scripts/host-smoke-test.mjs && npm run test:lib && npm test
